hidden_defects.condition: operator intends reflected review-plan originals to be deleted, but the ledger wording could imply indefinite preservation.
hidden_defects.impact: reflected review addenda could accumulate and make the backlog look larger than the remaining work.
hidden_defects.fix: deletion policy now explicitly states original review file preservation is not required after reflection evidence; delete command defaults to one reflected file per run.
hidden_defects.reproducibility: tests verify reflected files can be deleted without preserving the original and pending files remain blocked.
hidden_defects.live_safety_impact: no live permission is created; deletion still requires reflected patch evidence and false live flags.
hidden_defects.ux_impact: operator can refresh 검토안 with new files while reflected files are removed cleanly.
